_provenance: Synthetic per-symphony input representing a cycle after the trigger fires. Derived from AC-M1F.2.1 (Model A freeze rule) and AC-M1F.1.2 (is_post_trigger flag). triggered_at_return is a representative value captured at trigger time — never production output.
_scenario: Post-trigger: bot_state['triggered']=True. shadow_return must freeze at triggered_at_return; is_post_trigger=1.

shadow_return.comment: post-trigger: shadow_return frozen at triggered_at_return (Model A, AC-M1F.2.1)
